user.title: Clockify Overtime Tracker
user.description: Enter your Clockify API key. You can find it at {settings_url}

data.excluded_project_ids: Projects to exclude from billable hours

data_description.correction_hours: Enter positive hours to subtract (e.g. overtime that has been paid out). Use negative values to add extra hours.
data_description.excluded_project_ids: These projects are excluded from the billable hours calculation even if they are marked as billable.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to Clockify. Please check your API key and network connection.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Please check the logs.

abort.already_configured: Clockify Overtime is already configured for this account.
